creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Sorry, I've been away most of this thread! What I've seen looks good, but I'm still reading through it and very much appreciate how thorough you're being as it helps me learn more about the NLS work

Not 100% sure why we would be better off going no build, but I will definitely defer to your experience here!

It's not like we need to do any crazy patching pre-build, lol

Haven't read all of it, but what I have seen I like.
